subject: C1: Move outer retry policy into run_forecast.py
description: Right now run_forecast.py has 3 inner watchdog restarts and SKILL.md documents 10 outer retries with escalating cool-offs (3-min x3, then +5min each up to 38min). Promote the outer retry schedule into run_forecast.py as a --max-outer-retries flag (default 10) and remove the manual workflow from SKILL.md. One retry policy, in code.
